mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMUNITY_POST ( POST_ID, USER_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, UPDATED_AT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{postId}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT P.POST_ID AS postId, P.USER_ID AS userId, U.NAME AS writerName, P.TITLE AS title, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(P.CONTENT, 4000, 1) AS content, P.VIEW_COUNT AS viewCount, F.FILE_TYPE AS fileType, F.FILE_PATH AS filePath, TO_CHAR(P.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(P.UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS updatedAt, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMUNITY_COMMENT C WHERE C.POST_ID = P.POST_ID ) AS commentCount FROM COMMUNITY_POST P JOIN USERS U ON P.USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN COMMUNITY_FILE F ON P.POST_ID = F.POST_ID ORDER BY P.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT P.POST_ID AS postId, P.USER_ID AS userId, U.NAME AS writerName, P.TITLE AS title, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(P.CONTENT, 4000, 1) AS content, TO_CHAR(P.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(P.UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS updatedAt FROM COMMUNITY_POST P JOIN USERS U ON P.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE P.POST_ID = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMUNITY_COMMENT ( COMMENT_ID, POST_ID, USER_ID, CONTENT, UPDATED_AT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( 'CMT' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') || LPAD(TRUNC(DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE(1, 9999)), 4, '0'), #{postId}, #{userId}, #{content}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT C.COMMENT_ID AS commentId, C.POST_ID AS postId, C.USER_ID AS userId, U.NAME AS writerName, C.CONTENT AS content, TO_CHAR(C.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(C.UPDATED_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS updatedAt FROM COMMUNITY_COMMENT C JOIN USERS U ON C.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE C.POST_ID = #{postId} ORDER BY C.CREATED_AT ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMUNITY_FILE ( FILE_ID, POST_ID, FILE_TYPE, ORIGINAL_NAME, SAVE_NAME, FILE_PATH, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SYS_GUID(), #{postId}, #{fileType}, #{originalName}, #{saveName}, #{filePath}, SYSDATE )
